_comment: Installer-only file. Restaurant info comes from the owner via Telegram onboarding → restaurant-profile.json. This file holds API plumbing only.

composio._comment: One Composio Organization per restaurant client. The org-scoped API key + userId are the only credentials this VM needs. All platform connections (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, Drive) and the OpenRouter credential live inside the org, scoped to the userId. No third-party API keys on the VM.

imageGen._comment: Image generation only. Chat/captions/research run on Hermes's own model. Model is fetched through Composio's OpenRouter credential. Update when better models ship.
